payer: DemoCare Health Plan (synthetic payer — hand-structured for hackathon demo)
policyNote: Synthetic policy modeled on common commercial medical-necessity criteria for lumbar spine MRI. Not a real payer document.
indication: Chronic low back pain without red flags

criteria.label: Symptom duration
criteria.description: Low back pain persisting for at least 6 weeks despite conservative management.

criteria.label: Conservative therapy trial
criteria.description: Completion of (or documented enrollment in) at least 6 weeks of provider-directed conservative therapy — e.g., physical therapy, supervised home exercise program, or chiropractic care — within the preceding 6 months, with provider/facility and dates identified.

criteria.label: Pharmacologic management
criteria.description: Trial of analgesic or anti-inflammatory pharmacotherapy, with the response (or reason for discontinuation) documented.

criteria.label: Red-flag and neurologic screen
criteria.description: Documented screening showing absence of red flags (bowel/bladder dysfunction, saddle anesthesia, progressive motor deficit, fever, unexplained weight loss) and a current neurologic examination. Presence of red flags routes to an expedited pathway instead.

criteria.label: Functional impairment
criteria.description: Persistent pain or functional limitation interfering with daily activities or work despite the measures above.
